title: Diplosoma insignis
taxonomy: Diplosoma insignis belongs to the phylum Chordata, specifically within the class Ascidiacea, which is a group of marine animals known as sea squirts. This classification places Diplosoma insignis among the tunicates, a class of marine animals characterized by their unique body structure and filter-feeding lifestyle. The family to which Diplosoma insignis belongs is Polycitoridae, which is a family of ascidian tunicates. Within the Polycitoridae family, Diplosoma insignis is further classified into the genus Diplosoma, which is a genus of marine ascidians. Further classification of Diplosoma insignis includes its species name, Diplosoma insignis, which is a species of ascidian tunicates.
